name: ASUS PROART B760-CREATOR WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-7200(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Intel 1Gb LAN - Wi-Fi 6 802.11ax
shortName: ASUS PROART B760-CREATOR WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: ATX B760 creator motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with PCIe 5.0 and dual LAN.
